com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo

Class StatisticsJobInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.StatisticsJobInfo

  • public final class StatisticsJobInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides StatisticsJob information
    Since:
    API 5

      Returns application name

      Returns device job name

      Returns job started timestamp

    • Method Detail

      • getJobId

        public java.lang.String getJobId()
        Returns job id
        Returns:
        jobId

        • Return can be null if the jobId is null
        • Return can be null if the jobId is empty

        Since:
        API 5

      • getApplicationName

        • Return can be null if the applicationName is empty

      • getJobDestinations

        public StatisticsAttributes.JobDestination[] getJobDestinations()
        Retrieves job destinations
        Returns:
        jobDestinations

        • if StatisticsAttributes.JobDestination field is not added to JobDestination array list, the list should be empty.

        Since:
        API 5
